title: AUS Energy Bill
description: OCR training schema for Australian electricity bill. Fields grouped by page.

page1.title: Page 1
page1.description: Trang 1 — changeable: true. Header, account info, address, dates, total amount.

provider_name.title: Provider Name
provider_name.description: Trading name of the energy provider (e.g. 'EnergyAustralia').

provider_abn.title: Provider ABN
provider_abn.description: Australian Business Number of the provider (e.g. '99 086 014 968').

account_holder_name.title: Account Holder Name
account_holder_name.description: Full name of the account holder as printed (e.g. 'Miss S Sample').

service_address_street.title: Service Address — Street
service_address_street.description: Street number and name of the supply address (e.g. '37 Sample Road').

service_address_suburb.title: Service Address — Suburb
service_address_suburb.description: Suburb or locality of the supply address (e.g. 'SAMPLE SUBURB').

issue_date.title: Bill Issue Date
issue_date.description: Date the bill was issued, format YYYY-MM-DD (e.g. '2023-08-04').

total_amount_due.title: Total Amount Due
total_amount_due.description: Final payable amount after all discounts, incl. GST, in AUD (e.g. 538.77).

page2.title: Page 2
page2.description: Trang 2 — changeable: true. Plan, energy charges, solar, concessions, discounts, account summary.

billing_period_start.title: Billing Period Start
billing_period_start.description: Start date of the billing period, format YYYY-MM-DD (e.g. '2023-04-30').

billing_period_end.title: Billing Period End
billing_period_end.description: End date of the billing period, format YYYY-MM-DD (e.g. '2023-07-30').

billing_days.title: Billing Days
billing_days.description: Total number of days in the billing period (e.g. 92).

plan_name.title: Plan Name
plan_name.description: Name of the electricity plan as printed (e.g. 'Secure Saver - Home').

peak_usage_kwh.title: Peak Usage (kWh)
peak_usage_kwh.description: Total kWh consumed during peak hours this period (e.g. 4442.596).

peak_rate_per_kwh.title: Peak Rate ($/kWh)
peak_rate_per_kwh.description: Charge rate for peak consumption in $/kWh (e.g. 0.38368).

peak_charge.title: Peak Charge ($)
peak_charge.description: Total dollar charge for peak consumption in AUD (e.g. 1704.54).

offpeak_usage_kwh.title: Off-Peak Usage (kWh)
offpeak_usage_kwh.description: Total kWh consumed during off-peak hours this period (e.g. 3088.990).

offpeak_rate_per_kwh.title: Off-Peak Rate ($/kWh)
offpeak_rate_per_kwh.description: Charge rate for off-peak consumption in $/kWh (e.g. 0.1661).

offpeak_charge.title: Off-Peak Charge ($)
offpeak_charge.description: Total dollar charge for off-peak consumption in AUD (e.g. 513.08).

supply_days.title: Supply Days
supply_days.description: Number of days the daily supply charge applies (e.g. 92).

supply_rate_per_day.title: Supply Rate ($/day)
supply_rate_per_day.description: Daily supply/service charge rate in AUD (e.g. 1.067).

supply_charge.title: Supply Charge ($)
supply_charge.description: Total supply charge for the period in AUD (e.g. 98.16).

solar_export_kwh.title: Solar Export (kWh)
solar_export_kwh.description: Total kWh exported to the grid via solar feed-in (e.g. 15.741). Null if no solar.

solar_export_credit.title: Solar Export Credit ($)
solar_export_credit.description: Credit amount received for solar feed-in in AUD (e.g. 1.89). Null if no solar.

govt_concession_credit.title: Government Concession Credit ($)
govt_concession_credit.description: Total government concession or rebate credit in AUD (e.g. 280.15). Null if none.

plan_discount_credit.title: Plan Discount Credit ($)
plan_discount_credit.description: Discount credit applied from the current plan in AUD (e.g. 354.82). Null if none.

total_current_charges.title: Total Current Charges ($)
total_current_charges.description: Total charges for this billing period incl. GST before account history (e.g. 1678.93).

opening_balance.title: Opening Balance ($)
opening_balance.description: Balance brought forward from previous bill. Positive = amount owed (e.g. 203.39).

total_payments_received.title: Total Payments Received ($)
total_payments_received.description: Sum of all payments received since last bill in AUD (e.g. 432.00).

total_amount_due.title: Total Amount Due ($)
total_amount_due.description: Final payable amount after all discounts, incl. GST in AUD (e.g. 538.77).

total_amount_without_discount.title: Total Amount Without Discount ($)
total_amount_without_discount.description: Amount payable if paid late or without on-time discount in AUD (e.g. 1204.06).

page3.title: Page 3
page3.description: Trang 3 — changeable: false. Trang tĩnh chứa thông tin hỗ trợ và liên hệ. Không có trường OCR.
